indicators.name: large window
indicators.rationale: Large window may distract from cooking tasks and reduce concentration.

indicators.name: bar stools
indicators.rationale: Bar stools are not suitable for cooking tasks.

indicators.name: no stove or oven
indicators.rationale: No cooking appliances are visible, making it impossible to cook.

indicators.name: no sink
indicators.rationale: No water access for food preparation and cleaning.

indicators.name: no hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertops or hard washable work surfaces for food preparation.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for daily cooking due to the absence of essential cooking appliances, lack of water access, and no hard prep surfaces. The large window may also be a distraction. Overall, the space is not ideally suited for cooking.
